name: API Dash
description: API Dash — open-source, cross-platform API client built with Flutter, designed for exploring, testing, and generating API reference code.

seo.title: API Dash — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: API Dash: API Dash — open-source, cross-platform API client built with Flutter, designed for exploring, testing, and generating API reference code.

when_to_use: Cross-platform REST client for exploring third-party APIs
Code-generation from API requests in Python and Dart
Open-source Postman alternative for Flutter dev teams
Offline API testing environment with no account required
Team-shared API request collections via Git export

pros: Free, open source, and truly cross-platform via Flutter
Lightweight compared to bloated Postman alternatives
No account or cloud sync required to start
Generates code snippets in multiple languages
cons: Smaller ecosystem and plugin library than Postman
Flutter desktop UX feels slightly off on some platforms
Less mature request scripting than Insomnia
review.verdict: A refreshing lightweight API client - perfect solo use, weaker if you need team workspaces.
review.best_for: Solo developers who want a fast, offline-first API client without Postman's account bloat.
review.not_for: Teams needing shared workspaces, extensive scripting, or enterprise SSO and governance.
